q: Describe the purpose of your Decision Support System and the enterprise problem it aims to solve.

steps.label: Topic Sentence
steps.hint: Clearly state the enterprise problem and the overall purpose of your DSS.
steps.starter: The purpose of this Decision Support System is to address the enterprise problem of…

steps.label: Enterprise Problem Description
steps.hint: Briefly explain what the problem is and why it occurs in the enterprise environment.
steps.starter: This problem occurs when organisations… which results in…

steps.label: DSS Solution Overview
steps.hint: Describe how the DSS will help solve or support decisions related to the problem.
steps.starter: The system will assist users by analysing data and providing recommendations about…

steps.label: Linking Statement
steps.hint: Connect the problem and the DSS purpose.
steps.starter: Therefore, the DSS supports enterprise decision-making by…
